summary: Regression retest for SocialBoost Pro after main agent fixes. Both previously-reported bugs are confirmed FIXED. Backend sanity + Stripe checkout/status + admin/services/login endpoints all healthy. Full pytest suite targeted at regressions passed (7/7); end-to-end Playwright flow from Services -> Order now -> New Order -> Place order -> /orders works end to end.
critical_code_review_comments: payments_router.stripe_status: try/except around emergentintegrations call returns 200 with stored transaction fields + 'error' string fallback — verified working (tested with a just-created checkout session the sandbox can't immediately look up; endpoint returned 200 and surfaced the error message in the body rather than 500).

NewOrder.jsx: added dedicated useEffect keyed on [services, params] that, once services load, looks up ?service=<id> and sets platform/category/service_id/quantity — verified pre-populates all 3 selects and summary; Place order button is enabled immediately on navigation.
No new issues observed. Pre-existing non-blocking suggestions from iteration 1 still stand (login brute-force lockout, silence 401 console spam on initial /auth/me).
test_credentials: admin@socialboost.pro / Admin@12345 (admin); demo@socialboost.pro / Demo@12345 (user). Demo balance is ~$46 after this test.
seed_data_creation: None. One real order ($0.04, TikTok Video Views, 500 qty) created for demo user during E2E verification; balance decremented from ~$46.17 to $46.13.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both iteration-1 regressions are fixed and verified. Backend test suite /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is the regression baseline (27 tests, all relevant ones passing). For Bug #1 the Stripe session created via the SDK is occasionally not retrievable immediately by get_checkout_status on this Stripe test account — the endpoint now returns 200 with 'error' populated and stored tx fields as fallback, which is the intended behavior. For Bug #2 the preset effect keys on [services, params] and correctly hydrates Platform/Category/Service.
rca of the issue: Bug #1 RCA: emergentintegrations pydantic validation / session-lookup errors bubbled up as 500. Fix wraps the call in try/except and falls back to stored payment_transactions fields while exposing the error string. Verified via curl + pytest + e2e. Bug #2 RCA: NewOrder.jsx had no handler for ?service= query param. Fix adds a useEffect([services, params]) that looks up the service and sets platform/category/serviceId/quantity once services are loaded. Verified: dropdown values set to 'tiktok' / 'Views' / 'TikTok Video Views — $0.08/1k', summary non-empty, submit enabled, order placed, navigated to /orders, balance decremented.
